// Numeric, conversion, special, and aggregate functions.
// CASE, constants, types, and English aliases accepted by the grammar.
WHEN Source.Enabled = True AND Source.Value IS NOT NULL THEN "active"
WHEN Source.Enabled = False OR Source.Value = Undefined THEN "inactive"
// Grouping sets, union, hierarchy, totals, and ordering controls.
// More date and trigonometric aliases in one focused projection.
INNER JOIN TableB AS B ON A.Key = B.Key
RIGHT OUTER JOIN TableC AS C ON B.Key = C.Key
FULL OUTER JOIN TableD AS D ON C.Key = D.Key
